name_en: Upgraded Version ⚠️ M40712 Monogram! Mahjong Bag. This accessory bag is a forever classic style. A small, lightweight canvas handbag that can be carried by hand or crossbody. It is a classic style suitable for any occasion. The zip design makes it more convenient to use. Size: 21 x 13 x 3 cm
